reviews.review_description:
Honestly, this Formula Racing game is actually really fun. The controls feel smooth and the graphics look pretty.
Only thing I felt is that car customization would make it even better.
Overall, if you like Formula 1 racing, this is definitely worth playing.

Am I missing something, I hope I am. From the pictures it looks like your racing other cars. Since I got this I have drove 3 laps around a track on my own through yellow gates. After 3 laps it goes back to that. Am I missing something here

developer_response.body:
Hi rhubarb.260017,

Thank you for your feedback and for taking the time to share your experience.

We sincerely apologize for the confusion and inconvenience you encountered. After investigating the issue you reported, we discovered that it was caused by a problem on our end. The good news is that our team has already resolved it in the latest update, Version 1.0.4 (5).

We kindly ask you to update the game to the newest version and try again. The issue should no longer occur, and you should now be able to enjoy the intended gameplay experience.

We truly appreciate your patience and understanding while we worked on the fix. Feedback like yours helps us identify issues quickly and improve the game for everyone.

If the update resolves the problem and you're enjoying the experience, we would be incredibly grateful if you would consider updating your rating and review. Positive ratings support our team and allow us to continue improving the game and deliver new content more effectively.

Thank you again for your support, rhubarb.260017. If you experience any further issues, please don't hesitate to contact us. We're always happy to help.
